channel.title: Ra's Log
channel.description: Learning notes by ra_xxx on AI systems, evaluation, human models, shopping agents, and clear thinking.

item.title: Test-Time Compute Changes What a Benchmark Means
item.description: Model capability is closer to a budget function than a single score.

item.title: Hidden Goals Are Not Directly Visible
item.description: User actions are traces, not complete goals.

item.title: A Benchmark Is a Value Statement
item.description: A benchmark decides what behavior gets rewarded.
